hindi: भज गोविन्दं भज गोविन्दं, गोविन्दं भज मूढमते।
english: Worship Govinda, worship Govinda, worship Govinda, O foolish mind
roman: Bhaj Govindam Bhaj Govindam, Govindam bhaj mudhamate

hindi: सम्प्राप्ते सन्निहिते काले, नहि नहि रक्षति डुकृञ्करणे॥
english: When the time of death comes near, the rules of grammar will not save you
roman: Samprapte sannihite kale, nahi nahi rakshati Dukrinkarane

hindi: मूढ जहीहि धनागमतृष्णां, कुरु सद्बुद्धिं मनसि वितृष्णाम्।
english: O fool, abandon the greed for wealth, cultivate right understanding free from desire
roman: Mudha jahihi dhanagama trisnam, kuru sadbuddhim manasi vitrisnam

hindi: यल्लभसे निजकर्मोपात्तं, वित्तं तेन विनोदय चित्तम्॥
english: Be content with whatever you obtain through your own righteous effort
roman: Yallabhase nija karmopattam, vittam tena vinodaya chittam

hindi: नारीस्तनभर नाभीदेशं, दृष्ट्वा मा गा मोहावेशम्।
english: Do not be deluded by the sight of a woman's bosom and navel
roman: Naristanabhara nabhidesham, drishtva ma ga mohavesham

english: Reflect again and again in the mind that this is merely a modification of flesh and fat
roman: Etanmamsa vasadi vikaram, manasi vichintaya varam varam

hindi: वयसि गते कः कामविकारः, शुष्के नीरे कः कासारः।
english: When youth is gone what passion remains? When water dries up what is the lake?
roman: Vayasi gate kah kama vikarah, shushke nire kah kasarah

hindi: क्षीणे वित्ते कः परिवारः, ज्ञाते तत्त्वे कः संसारः॥
english: When wealth is gone who are the family? When truth is known what is the world?
roman: Ksheene vitte kah parivara, gnate tattve kah samsarah

hindi: कुरु सत्सङ्गं त्यज दुःसङ्गं, भज नित्यमनित्यमुपेहि।
english: Seek the company of saints, abandon bad company, worship daily and approach the eternal
roman: Kuru satsangam tyaja dussangam, bhaja nityamanityamupaihi

hindi: अर्थमनर्थं भावय नित्यं, नास्तिततः सुखलेशः सत्यम्॥
english: Regard wealth as dangerous always — truly there is not even a trace of happiness in it
roman: Artham anartham bhavaya nityam, nastitat sukhaleshah satyam
